name: Interaction Channels
description: Owns optional human interaction over stable Tally contracts; no channel is selected yet. A WhatsApp or Hermes-like path may remain an external agent adapter over the CLI. If a web interface is selected, the architecture must use a PostgreSQL database through Entity Framework Core, a backend on the latest stable .NET available to the project, and a frontend on the latest stable Angular using the NxGN UI npm package. That web choice implies a service boundary and must be resolved before technical design rather than treated as a cosmetic frontend addition. Awaiting its own brainstorm.
problem_statement: Dirk needs convenient access to Tally commands and insights, but choosing a web application or WhatsApp-style interface before the CLI contract is stable would couple the finance core to an uncertain delivery channel.
why_now: The boundary must be explicit now so CLI design remains channel-neutral while human interaction is deferred.
